---
id: flag-targets-controller-delete-target
title: "Remove a feature flag target"
description: "Removes a target from the feature flag's target list in the current environment. Currently, supported targets include users and organizations."
sidebar_label: "Remove a feature flag target"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Remove a feature flag target"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/feature-flags/{slug}/targets/{resourceId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Removes a target from the feature flag's target list in the current environment. Currently, supported targets include users and organizations.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
